calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. This dismissal pertains to the remaining cross complaint(s). JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
